name: Wolfe et al. Compare Example-, Continuation-, and Sentence-level Prompt Strategies
statement: Wolfe et al. generate simulated essays from real student essays using three prompt-engineering strategies: 25 examples, Predict Next, and Sentence prompting.
population_or_context: Simulated essays for automated-scoring data augmentation.
time_horizon: arXiv preprint retrieved and reviewed on 2026-06-02.
quantitative_note: 96 real essays and 288 simulated essays are staged from the prior reviewed extraction.
caveats: The public text staged here does not name the exact model version.
evaluation_method: Expert scoring, score-distribution comparison, agreement metrics, and realism ratings.
reported_metrics: Exact agreement, weighted kappa, score-distribution comparisons, and realism ratings.
limitations: The source is stronger for prompt-strategy comparison than for broad response-generation generalization.

source_locator.quote_or_paraphrase_note: The staged finding reuses the already-reviewed prompt-strategy extraction from the scorer-validation baseline.
